text.message: black dont you see that blue is far ahead?

especially 11
and I got unlucky
almost no 8s and 10s
Yeah lol it’s really competitive you got this
i think it was a good move for my game, i cant see why it ruins it

i can see ofc why it hurts you
i know
but not because I plowed you
the rolls just dont favour me this game

10 rolled once so far
Well you shouldn’t went 3:1 first
i thought the 5 could help me to city fast
and in normal dice i should have been able to settle a long time ago

yeah there is a thing called luck
